step.name: Write Code & Tests
step.description: Developer writes feature code and corresponding test cases

step.name: Compile & Type Check
step.description: Astro build compiles all pages, checks TypeScript types, resolves imports

step.name: Run Tests & Playwright
step.description: Playwright end-to-end tests run against the built site covering page loads, accuracy, navigation, accessibility

step.name: Code Review
step.description: Automated code review checks code quality, complexity, duplication, and coding standards

step.name: Checkmarx SAST Scan
step.description: Static Application Security Testing for vulnerabilities. DISABLED: Account not configured yet

step.name: Scout QA Tests
step.description: AI-powered QA runs exploratory testing — visual regressions, broken links, UX issues

step.name: SonarQube Quality Gate
step.description: Deep code quality analysis — code smells, technical debt, coverage metrics, duplication percentage. DISABLED: MCP server not connected

step.name: Aikido Security Scan
step.description: Final security gate — SAST, IaC scanning, and secrets detection. Zero critical findings required

step.name: Production Build
step.description: Final optimised production build — tree-shaking, minification, asset hashing, image optimisation

step.name: Deploy to Staging
step.description: Deploy built assets to Cloudflare Workers staging environment for pre-production testing

step.name: Post-Deployment Tests
step.description: Run comprehensive Nova Act QA tests against staging to certify all features work

step.name: Push to GitHub Backup
step.description: Commit and push all code to github.com/rajnaik/xConvert24 for DR backup after staging tests pass

step.name: Deploy to Production
step.description: Promote staging build to live production on Cloudflare global network
step.tools: Cloudflare Workers,Cloudflare Pages,Wrangler CLI,Global CDN,D1 Database

step.name: Post-Live Tests
step.description: Run final verification tests against live production to confirm deployment succeeded
